scripts.build: yarn workspace @rpckit/core run build && yarn workspace @rpckit/websocket run build && yarn workspace @rpckit/tcp run build && yarn workspace @rpckit/http run build && yarn workspace @rpckit/fallback run build && yarn workspace @rpckit/cluster run build
scripts.publish:all: yarn build && npm publish --access public -w packages/core && npm publish --access public -w packages/websocket && npm publish --access public -w packages/tcp && npm publish --access public -w packages/http && npm publish --access public -w packages/fallback && npm publish --access public -w packages/cluster
